name: Super Archer fun
description: This is a recreational shooting game. The player will play a cowboy and gallop through the fields on his horse. There will be many gold coins along the way. Don't hesitate to take it. Be careful to avoid obstacles on the road, and pull the bow to kill the enemies on the road.
instructions: 1 Easy to operate and use 2 Press and hold the screen to aim and release the shot 3 Mobile phone shooting is more difficult
